title: MidiCraft
description: Use your MIDI keyboard in-game with noteblocks. Client-side.
body:
# MidiCraft
This mod allows you to use a MIDI keyboard in minecraft. You can set any note on the keyboard to any note-block in-game and you can play on them.

This is a client-side mod, so it can be used on servers. Lag will affect the note blocks, so it unfortunately may not always work for other players perfectly.

***May induce seizures due to rapid movement of camera.***

### Usage
- Play a note **while sneaking** to **assign** the note to the block you're looking at.
- Play a note **without sneaking** to **hit** the noteblock corresponding to the note.
